title: Grilled Shrimp Tikka
description: A flavorful and spicy Indian-inspired dish made with succulent shrimp marinated in a mix of yogurt, spices, and herbs, then grilled to perfection.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine cilantro, cumin, ginger, garam masala, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
2. Blend until smooth and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt and lemon juice.
4. Add the spice mix to the yogurt mixture and whisk until well combined.
5. Add the shrimp to the marinade and mix until they are evenly coated.
6. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
8. Remove the shrimp from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
9. Grill the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
10. Serve hot with additional cilantro and lemon wedges if desired.
